programs.title: Deal Or No Deal
programs.desc: Ben Reali a mobile barber from QUEENSLAND who focuses on Grooms on their big day. All he wants is a van to take his operation on the road. Can he cut The Banker down to size as they go head to head?

programs.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programs.desc: A flight attendant, a Kylie Minogue fan, a dentist and a lab analyst are amongst the six hopefuls taking to the hot seat in this episode, aiming to turn their knowledge into one million dollars.

programs.title: MasterChef Australia
programs.desc: Six contestants face elimination as they must create a dish that represent their family food traditions to fight for their place in the competition.

programs.title: Elsbeth
programs.desc: When a serial bride is found bludgeoned in her apartment, Elsbeth investigates the victim's best friend, a particularly experienced, and bitter bridesmaid.

programs.title: 10's Late News
programs.desc: Comprehensive coverage of local, national and international news. Plus, all the latest sport and weather.

programs.title: The Cheap Seats
programs.desc: Taking a fun look at the week that was are The Cheap Seats hosts Melanie Bracewell and Tim McDonald.
